creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #25, in reply to Mike Karels from comment #26)

I'm no longer in two minds about /boot/overlays/ – re: <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/db180ae55c99fa3330e57ad1b76c9d4b30584e25>, it _is_ useful to have the listing, regardless of whether the directory is present in a standard installation of the OS.
